confirmed_building.scope_note: Exact mall identity confirmed before Gate 3 evidence review.

unresolved_exceptions.description: No target-specific public red, yellow, green, restricted-use, or similar post-earthquake tag/status answer was found.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request latest tag/status records from the OBO, City Engineer, or disaster-risk office.

manual_request_targets.target: Cebu City Office of the Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask for any latest post-earthquake tag/status record for the confirmed building.
manual_request_targets.reason: Status-answer lanes require an official or professional target-specific answer.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: No public answer found for latest post-earthquake tag/status after the recorded searches.
overclaim_boundary.missing_evidence_statement: The lack of a public answer does not resolve the actual tag/status record.

query_log.result_summary: No target-specific public tag/status answer found.
No target-specific public tag/status answer found.

packet_result.summary: No public answer found for latest post-earthquake tag/status for the confirmed building.
